scores.feedback: Generally accurate rendering. 'Time for thee to respect thyself will be at an end' slightly shifted to 'time you deserve self-respect'—minor drift. 'Do, soul, do' flattened (second 'do' dropped). Style somewhat modernized, loses archaic Stoic register.

Meaning largely preserved. 'souls and conceits' rendered adequately. Archaic/Stoic register flattened to modern Bengali prose; imperative opening 'Do, soul, do' loses force. Minor drift in conjunction logic.

Meaning generally preserved. Imperatives 'mishandle og foragte' should be infinitive forms or lack coherence with 'gør det'. Archaic/stoic register flattened; 'yet a while' rendered loosely. Overall competent but modern-sounding.
Accurate rendering; 'misshandle' slightly strong for 'abuse'. Style somewhat modern, lacks archaic stoic register of 1862 source. Fluent and idiomatic German.

Accurate meaning overall; 'κακοποίει' imperative form is irregular (should be κακοποίησε/κακοποιεί). 'consist in' rendered as 'depend on' - minor drift. Register modernized, loses archaic Stoic gravitas.
Cyrillic letters mixed into 'despreciate' (script mismatch). Meaning largely preserved but archaic/stoic register flattened; 'continua' weakens the imperative 'Do, do'. Minor drift.
Accurate and fluent rendering. 'Le moment ou tu devras te respecter sera revolu' slightly shifts meaning (the time TO respect will end, implying urgency now). Style appropriately elevated.

Meaning largely preserved but gender agreement inconsistent throughout (soul is feminine, switches to masculine mid-sentence). 'Happiness' rendered as 'joy' rather than well-being/eudaimonia. Register is modern, lacking archaic/stoic weight of 'abuse and contemn'.

Meaning preserved overall. 'abuse and contemn' rendered as 'fill with ill-will and contempt' slightly off (should be imperative self-abuse). Archaic Stoic register flattened to modern Hindi prose; 'conceits' weakened to 'thoughts'.
Accurate rendering overall. 'Eksternal' is modern register for a 17th-c. style text. 'Conceits' flattened to 'pendapat'. Imperative voice preserved well.

Accurate rendering overall. 'Anima, agisci' slightly loses the self-address of 'Do, soul, do'. 'Giudizi' for 'conceits' is a mild drift. Fluent modern Italian but archaic/biblical register somewhat flattened.

Opening 'Do, soul, do' rendered awkwardly with bare verb stem repetition, not idiomatic. 'time...will be at an end' correctly conveys deadline but slightly muddled. Otherwise meaning mostly preserved; register acceptable but flattened.
Meaning largely preserved. Opening imperative 'Do, soul, do' reduced to repetition of abuse/contemn, losing the distinct exhortation. Archaic/maxim register flattened to modern prose.
Accurate rendering overall. 'Ga door' softens 'Do, do' imperative. Archaic register of 1862 English flattened into modern Dutch; some rhetorical urgency lost.

Meaning mostly preserved but 'yet a while...at an end' inverted - original says time for self-respect will END, translation says it will COME. 'Gardzij' is non-standard imperative. Second sentence has grammatical break (dangling participle, no main verb).

Opening imperative 'Do, soul, do' mistranslated as reflexive 'make yourself'. 'Time to respect thyself will be at an end' rendered inversely as 'will cease to respect'—contresens. Otherwise readable, decent register.
Accurate rendering overall; 'distract' as 'confuse/embarrass' slightly off; archaic/imperative register flattened to modern neutral Russian, losing the aphoristic Stoic voice.
Meaning broadly preserved but 'yet a while...respect thyself will be at an end' slightly reshaped; archaic stoic register flattened to modern Swedish; 'conceits' rendered simply as opinions.
Generally faithful. 'happiness' rendered as sensory pleasure weakens philosophical tone. 'distract' softened to 'confuse'. Reflexive construction slightly awkward. Stoic register somewhat flattened.

Meaning largely preserved. 'abuse and contemn' rendered as 'despise and be careless' - second verb slightly off. 'distract' rendered as 'agitate' - minor drift. Archaic register flattened but acceptable.
Meaning largely preserved but archaic Stoic register flattened to modern conversational Vietnamese ('bạn'). 'Souls and conceits' rendered loosely. Imperative force weakened.
Opening 'Do, soul, do' mistranslated as 'exercise self-restraint' - misses the imperative urging action. Otherwise meaning largely preserved; fluent modern Chinese but archaic register flattened.

'Studio' transliterated rather than rendered as 'atelier/marsam'. 'Pink-flowering thorn' simplified to pink blossom, losing hawthorn specificity. Laburnum's honey-sweet/honey-colored rendered as sweet/golden, losing the honey parallelism. Generally fluent.
Persian saddle-bags divan rendered awkwardly as lying on Persian saddle, losing the divan-cushion image. 'honey-sweet' weakened to just 'sweet'. Otherwise faithful and reasonably fluent.
Meaning preserved well. 'sommerwind' is German/anglicism (should be 'sommervind'). 'tjørnebusk' gender mismatch ('det' vs 'den'). 'honningssøde' has extra s. Minor fluency issues.

Accurate overall. 'saddle-bags' rendered as 'Satteldecken' (saddle blankets) is a minor specialized-term error. 'eines Goldregen' should be 'eines Goldregens' (genitive). 'honigartig' slightly flattens 'honey-sweet'.
Laburnum transliterated rather than translated; 'honey-sweet/honey-coloured' rendered with non-standard coinage; 'saddle-bags' drifted to 'saddles'; otherwise faithful.
Minor drift: 'espina blanca con flores rosadas' adds 'blanca' incorrectly for pink-flowering thorn. 'apenas podía vislumbrar' slightly off from 'could just catch'. Otherwise faithful and fluent.

'Could just catch' rendered as 'à peine apercevoir' is acceptable but slight drift. 'Honey-sweet and honey-coloured' split awkwardly ('jaune miel et au doux parfum'), losing the parallel. 'S'agitait' for 'stirred' slightly strong. Otherwise faithful and fluent.

Meaning largely preserved. 'Just catch' rendered as 'barely notice' slightly shifts sense. 'Studio' transliterated rather than 'atelier'. Gender agreement issue with 'ruach ha-kayitz ha-kala'. 'Saddle-bags' literal calque. Style flattened, less lyrical than source.

Meaning largely preserved. 'Persian saddle-bags' rendered as 'Persian saddle' loses the cushion/bag sense. 'Laburnum' left transliterated. 'Lilac' as bakayan is approximate. Prose readable but flattens Wilde's sensuous cadence; 'bas dikh sakti thi' slightly awkward.

Accurate overall. 'pink-flowering thorn' rendered literally as 'pink-flowering thorn' loses the hawthorn referent. 'could just catch' as 'baru saja dapat' slightly off (just=barely). Syntax around 'divan of Persian saddle-bags' awkward. Style somewhat flattened.
Accurate rendering; 'selle persiane' slightly literal for saddle-bags cushions; 'albero di laburno' redundant (maggiociondolo preferred); 'gleam' as 'bagliore' acceptable. Style mostly preserved.
Accurate and natural. 'Divan' rendered as 'sofa' loses nuance; laburnum glossed descriptively works. Slight register flattening vs Wilde's aesthete prose.

Generally faithful. 'Studio' left as loanword (atelier sense lost); 'perfume' rendered literally as fragrance-product word, slightly awkward. Laburnum transliterated without gloss. Order of honey-sweet/colored swapped, minor drift.

Accurate rendering; 'drong' lacks object ('binnen' missing) creating slight grammatical awkwardness. Comma placement around 'talloze sigaretten' is clunky. Hyphenated 'honing-zoete/gekleurde' is un-Dutch calque.

'Studio' left as anglicism (should be 'pracownia'). 'diwan z perskich siodeł' ungrammatical (needs 'diwanu'/'sofy z perskich juków'). 'ledwie dostrzec' slightly shifts 'could just catch'. 'honey-sweet' flattened.
Minor issues: 'estúdio' for studio (ateliê preferable); 'da lilás' gender wrong; 'almofadas persas' loses saddle-bags specificity; 'apenas' placement slightly awkward but meaning preserved.
Studio rendered as calque 'студия' (should be 'мастерская'). 'Pink-flowering thorn' simplified. 'Could just catch' rendered as 'barely could' slightly shifts meaning. Otherwise faithful.

Mostly faithful. 'saddle-bags' rendered as calque 'sadelbagar' (should be 'sadelväskor'). 'parfymen' is an anglicism where 'doften' fits; 'delikata' also calque. 'pink-flowering thorn' simplified. Agreement issue 'honungsöt/honungsfärgade'.

divan mistranslated as 'rhythm/beat' (taalam) instead of couch/sofa — notable error. 'just catch the gleam' rendered awkwardly as 'merely able to catch'. Grammar agreement issue in final clause. Otherwise faithful.

Meaning largely preserved but 'divan' rendered as 'bed', 'saddle-bags' literal as 'saddle bags' (should be cushions). 'Just catch the gleam' slightly mistranslated as seeing a little. Style somewhat flattened, MT-ish phrasing.

Typo ('thoảt' for 'thoảng'); 'pink-flowering thorn' mistranslated as rose-flowering thorn; 'divan of Persian saddle-bags' rendered awkwardly; 'gleam' flattened to 'light'; 'laburnum' untranslated; syntax clumsy, aesthetic register lost.

Accurate rendering; 'pink-flowering thorn' as hawthorn is acceptable. 'Divan of Persian saddle-bags' slightly literal. 'Honey-sweet and honey-coloured' doubled as 蜜甜而蜜色 is awkward. Overall faithful, minor style flattening.
Accurate rendering of all technical concepts. Natural Arabic phrasing. 'body of reference' as 'جسم الإسناد' is acceptable. 'المطور' slightly awkward for 'developed'; minor register drift.
Accurate rendering of the physics argument. 'tacitly' as 'silently' is slightly off; 'just seen' rendered as 'right now seen' is minor drift. Technical terms handled adequately.
Accurate, fluent Danish rendering. Minor: 'blev udviklet' slightly shifts 'advent'; otherwise faithful and natural, with appropriate scientific register.
Accurate, fluent rendering preserving scientific register. Minor: 'Entstehung' slightly weaker than 'advent'; otherwise faithful and natural.

Accurate rendering. 'είχε πάντα υποτίθεται' is grammatically awkward (should be 'είχε πάντα θεωρηθεί' or similar). 'δήλωση του χρόνου' is literal; 'χρονικός προσδιορισμός' more idiomatic. 'Τμήμα' for Section acceptable.
Accurate and fluent rendering. Minor drift: 'statement of time' rendered as 'medición' (measurement) rather than 'enunciado/afirmación'; slight loss of nuance but meaning preserved.
Accurate, fluent rendering preserving logical structure. 'Énoncé du temps' is literal but defensible for 'statement of time'. Minor: 'à la section' vs 'dans la section' acceptable.
Accurate rendering. 'Tacitly' as 'obscurely' slightly off (should be 'implicitly'). Otherwise natural Hebrew, appropriate register, Section numeral kept as VII is acceptable.

Accurate and clear rendering. 'Simultaneity' as 'समकालीनता' is acceptable but 'एक-समयता/युगपतता' is more standard in physics. Minor tense drift ('had been assumed' rendered as present perfect). Otherwise faithful and fluent.
Accurate rendering; 'kesejamakan' for simultaneity is unusual (standard is 'kesimultanan/keserentakan'), slight term drift. Otherwise natural and faithful.

Accurate rendering; 'affermazione del tempo' is a literal calque of 'statement of time' (better: 'indicazione/determinazione del tempo'). 'Assunto/assunzione' are anglicisms; 'ipotesi/supposto' more idiomatic.
Accurate and faithful rendering. 'just seen' as 'ちょうど今見た' is slightly literal/awkward; parenthetical placement mildly clunky but acceptable. Register appropriate.
Accurate rendering with clear logical flow. 'body of reference' as 기준계 is acceptable. Parenthetical placement slightly awkward in Korean. Register appropriate for popular science.
Accurate and fluent Dutch rendering. 'Referentiestelsel' is slightly more technical than 'body of reference' but acceptable. Natural phrasing throughout.
Accurate rendering. 'Właśnie widzieliśmy' slightly awkward (better: 'właśnie zobaczyliśmy/widzieliśmy'). 'Propagacji' acceptable calque; 'rozchodzenia się' more natural. Minor stylistic flattening.
Accurate and fluent rendering. 'Statement of time' as 'medida do tempo' (measure) is a slight drift from 'enunciado/afirmação'. Otherwise natural and clear.

Accurate and clear rendering. 'Утверждение о времени' is a literal calque of 'statement of time'; 'указание времени' or 'задание времени' would be more natural in Russian physics discourse. 'Конфликт' slightly colloquial vs 'противоречие'.
Accurate and fluent Swedish rendering; preserves logical structure and technical terms. Minor: 'Now before' opener slightly flattened, tense shift ('hade'/'är') mirrors source.
Meaning largely preserved. 'Principle of relativity' rendered as 'theory of relativity' - minor term conflation. 'Developed' translated literally as 'grew' is awkward. Otherwise clear and readable.
Accurate and fluent rendering. 'body of reference' translated as reference frame (slight drift). 'simultaneity' rendered descriptively but acceptable. Natural Thai scientific prose.

Accurate and fluent rendering. Minor drift: 'statement of time' rendered as 'concept of time' rather than 'phát biểu/nhận định về thời gian'; 'body of reference' generalized to 'hệ quy chiếu' (reference frame).
Accurate and clear. Minor redundancy in 'relativity theory' phrasing; 'statement of time' rendered literally but acceptable. Parenthetical placement slightly awkward but readable.

Accurate rendering overall; 'iron string' translated as 'iron rhythm/pace' (wataeera) instead of string/chord is a notable lexical error. 'Betraying' softened to 'revealing'. Fluent, dignified register.

'Divine providence' mistranslated as 'divine exhibition/display' - a notable lexical error. 'Betraying their perception' softened to 'expressing realization', losing the paradoxical nuance. Otherwise fluent and readable.

Iron string rendered as 'steel string' with double-definite grammar error ('den stålstrengen'). 'Guddommelig forsyn' wrong gender (should be 'den guddommelige forsyn/det'). 'Sammenhængen af' calque. Meaning mostly preserved but stiff, MT-feel.

Accurate and fluent. 'vibrates to' as 'schwingt mit' slightly off (should be 'auf'/'zu'). 'predominating' flattened to 'durchdrang'. 'betraying' as 'verrieten' works but loses nuance. Register slightly modernized ('akzeptiere').
'Iron string' mistranslated as 'row/order of iron' losing the string-instrument metaphor. 'Genius of their age' rendered as 'spirit' loses specificity. Otherwise faithful and fluent.
Accurate and fluent rendering. 'Eventos' is mild anglicism vs 'acontecimientos'. 'Revelando' softens 'betraying'. 'Al son de' adds slight drift. Register appropriately elevated.

Opening 'Fais confiance a toi-meme' is awkward calque (should be 'Aie confiance en toi'). 'tout leur existence' is grammar error (should be 'toute'). 'childlike' rendered as 'candeur' slightly softens. Otherwise faithful and elegant.

Solid rendering. 'Great men' as gender-specific is defensible in period. 'Betraying' rendered as 'revealing' loses slight irony. 'Confided themselves childlike' slightly softened. 'Genius of their age' adequate. Minor drift overall.

Generally faithful. 'Divine providence' rendered as 'divine nature'; 'found for you' shifted to 'determined'; 'betraying their perception' softened to 'revealing'. Fluent, dignified register but some aphoristic punch lost.

Accurate rendering overall. 'betraying' translated as 'mengungkapkan' loses the nuance of inadvertent revelation. 'providensi' is a calque but acceptable. 'childlike' as 'polos' slightly narrows meaning. Flow is natural.
Accurate rendering; 'tradendo' is literal for 'betraying' (here meaning revealing)—acceptable but ambiguous. 'con innocenza infantile' slightly expands 'childlike'. Register appropriate, flows well.

Accurate and fluent rendering. 'Betraying their perception' softened to 'showing' loses the nuance of unwitting revelation. 'Genius of their age' rendered literally as 'tensai' is slightly off; Zeitgeist nuance lost.

Meaning largely preserved. 'Betraying their perception' rendered as simply 'realized', losing the nuance of unwitting revelation. 'Genius of their age' literal but acceptable. Register slightly flat, aphoristic punch weakened.
Accurate, fluent Dutch rendering. 'Betraying their perception' slightly reframed as 'openbaarden dat zij voelden'; 'predominating' softened to 'doordringend'. Tone preserved.
Gender agreement error: 'Boski Opatrzność' (should be feminine 'Boska'). 'siedzi' too literal for 'was seated'; 'splecenie się' awkward. Meaning largely preserved.

Faithful rendering with archaic 2nd person fitting the register. 'Infantilmente' slightly negative vs 'childlike'; 'revelando' softens 'betraying'. 'Conexão' is a mild calque; 'concatenação/encadeamento' more idiomatic.

Accurate, fluent, preserves aphoristic tone. 'Trust thyself' rendered as 'believe in yourself' loses self-reliance nuance. 'Betraying their perception' softened to 'revealing by their behavior'—slight drift.
Accurate rendering; 'confided themselves childlike' well handled as 'överlämnat sig barnslikt'. Minor: 'ton' added to iron string image; 'barnslikt' slightly negative connotation. Flows naturally.
Script mix: stray Korean syllables appear in two words near the end, breaking Tamil script. 'Providence' rendered as 'compulsion' is a wrong term. 'Betraying' softened to 'revealed'.

Typo 'คนสมัยใจเจ้า' (should be contemporaries); 'genius of their age' rendered as 'mind/spirit of the age' is acceptable but 'จิตใจเด็กเนื้อหา' for 'childlike' is awkward/unclear. Register mostly elevated but some phrasing clunky.

Chinese characters 天真 left untranslated inside Vietnamese text - major script mismatch and untranslated source-adjacent word. 'Divine providence' flattened to 'Thượng đế'. Otherwise meaning preserved but style slightly stiff.

Generally faithful. 'society of contemporaries' rendered awkwardly as 'society of contemporaries of your era'. 'betraying' softened to 'this shows'. 'genius of their age' literal but acceptable. Style slightly explanatory.
Accurate and fluent rendering of all eight points. 'Records-keeper' nuance of first-person term lost; classical register slightly flattened into modern academic English, but tone largely preserved.
Generally faithful. Minor issues: 'from eight matters 入手' is a calque (should be 着手); '無病之呻吟' rendered as 'groaning without basis' loses idiom; classical-essay register slightly flattened.
Accurate overall. 'my heart remains the same' slightly misreads kokoromochi (feeling/sentiment is the same when writing). 'distant initial or abbreviation' adds 'abbreviation'. Register fine.

Accurate rendering of meaning. 'Shengshu de shoumu suoxie' slightly over-translates the simpler 'distant/impersonal initials'. Register is natural modern Chinese but loses some of Soseki's Meiji literary tone.

Generally faithful and fluent. Minor drifts: 'console myself' softens neutral 'explained to myself'; 'sink into melancholy' slightly overtranslated; 'so much more beautiful' narrower than 'much better'. Tone preserved.

Mostly faithful. 'heart couldn't help growing sad' rendered awkwardly as 'forbidden'. 'seemingly so' line translated stiffly. Minor drift on 'no progress but not necessarily as bleak'. Register slightly flat vs Lu Xun's introspective tone.

Meaning preserved well. 'Call me Ishmael' rendered as imperative-like 'ناديني' is acceptable but flat. Register is modern MSA, losing archaic literary voice; 'watery part' literal; 'spleen' weakened to generic melancholy.

Accurate rendering overall; 'sail about' softened to generic 'wander'. Minor spelling issue in 'circulation' word. Archaic literary register somewhat flattened to modern standard Bengali; 'grim about the mouth' idiom weakened.

English calque 'aldrig mind' left untranslated/ungrammatical (should be 'lige meget'). 'verdens vandige del' awkward calque. 'drive melankoli på bort' broken word order. Register acceptable but stiff.
Meaning preserved overall. 'grim about the mouth' rendered oddly as face 'swelling'—awkward/semi-contresens. 'wässrigen Teil' is a calque; 'drizzly' weakened to 'trüb'. Register modern, not archaic.

Accurate overall but flattened: 'little or no money' simplified, 'grim about the mouth' rendered literally as 'hard in the mouth' sounds odd, 'drizzly' as 'cloudy'. Modern register loses archaic literary voice.

Accurate overall. 'Llovizno' is not a Spanish word (should be 'lluvioso/de llovizna'). 'Poniendome adusto about the mouth' loses the mouth image. Register slightly flattened vs Melville's archaic voice.
Accurate and fluent modern French, but archaic/literary register is flattened. 'partie aqueuse' is awkward calque; 'grim about the mouth' reduced to 'morose', losing imagery.

Meaning preserved well. 'ain haya li' is ungrammatical (should be 'lo haya li'). 'grim about the mouth' rendered as 'gloomy in face', losing specificity. Register is modern/neutral rather than archaic literary; Melville's signature voice flattened.

Name left in Latin script (-1.0 for script mismatch). 'November' rendered with added 'night' - minor drift. Archaic literary tone flattened to modern conversational Hindi; 'spleen' simplified to sadness.
Accurate and natural rendering. 'Grim about the mouth' generalized to 'face looking gloomy' loses specificity. Archaic literary register somewhat flattened into modern Indonesian prose.

Meaning preserved. 'parte acquosa' is literal/awkward vs. standard 'parte acquea'. 'cupo in volto' slightly flattens 'grim about the mouth'. 'drizzly' rendered as 'grigio' loses drizzle nuance. Register acceptable but not archaic.
Accurate and natural rendering. 'never mind how long' slightly drifted to 'I don't remember'. Register is modern-literary rather than archaic; Melvillean voice flattened.
Meaning preserved but archaic literary voice flattened to modern neutral prose. 'watery part of the world' rendered literally/awkwardly. 'drizzly' simplified. Semicolon calqued.
Accurate and fluent. Minor drift: 'grim about the mouth' flattened to generic 'somber'; 'drizzly' rendered as 'grey' loses the drizzle; archaic register slightly modernized.
Name kept as 'Ishmael' rather than Polish 'Izmael'. 'Nie ważne' should be 'nieważne'. 'drizzly' rendered as 'mglisty' (foggy) is a drift. Register modernized, archaic literary voice flattened.
Accurate rendering; 'grim about the mouth' slightly flattened to just 'carrancudo' (loses mouth image). Register is modern-clean rather than archaic; 'bolsa' acceptable. Natural Portuguese.
Accurate and fluent but register is modernized, losing archaic literary voice. 'drizzly' flattened to 'мрачный' (repetition with next clause). 'grim about the mouth' generalized to face.
Calque 'aldrig sinne' for 'never mind' is a grammar break/nonsense. 'lite eller ingen pengar' wrong gender. 'grimmig' is a calque. 'högt tid' calque for 'high time'. 'drizzly' weakened.

Meaning largely preserved but 'grim about the mouth' mistranslated as looking at own mouth and feeling tired. Bengali/Devanagari char in 'ஆত்மா'. Archaic literary register flattened to neutral modern prose; 'purse' as English loan.
Meaning largely preserved but 'Some years ago' rendered as 'some years past' slightly off. 'drizzly' weakened. Archaic literary register flattened to neutral modern Thai; lacks Melville's cadence.
Meaning largely preserved but archaic literary register flattened to modern neutral prose. 'high time' rendered awkwardly as 'lúc cao nhất'. 'drizzly' slightly drifted. 'spleen' simplified.
Accurate and fluent rendering. 'watery part of the world' slightly paraphrased. Register is modern-literary rather than archaic; Melville's signature cadence and archaism softened.
Accurate, fluent Arabic rendering preserving meaning and Victorian argumentative tone. Slight flattening of 'reposing some confidence' and 'cautious in trusting'; minor style loss but no errors.

Meaning preserved. 'Authorities' rendered as 'kartripaksha' (administrative authority) is wrong specialized term; should be expert sources. Slight awkwardness in reader-trust clause. Register acceptable but not distinctly Victorian.

Accurate and fluent Danish rendering. Minor: 'gode autoriteter' flattened to 'pålidelige kilder'; 'almindelige konklusioner' slightly off for 'general conclusions' (better: 'generelle'). Victorian register adequate.
Accurate rendering; slight redundancy with 'Vertrauen'/'vertrauen'. 'Fakten' is modern; 'Tatsachen' would fit Victorian register better. Otherwise fluent and faithful.
Accurate rendering, natural Greek. 'Good authorities' flattened to 'reliable sources', losing Victorian register nuance. 'Facts' as 'γεγονότα' slightly off; 'στοιχεία' preferable. Otherwise faithful.
Accurate rendering with natural Spanish. Minor style flattening: 'diversas afirmaciones' slightly weak; final clause restructured losing some Victorian cadence. No meaning errors.
Accurate and fluent rendering preserving Victorian scientific register. 'Abrégé' works well. Minor: 'autorités' is calque-ish but acceptable in 19th-c. French scientific prose.

Accurate rendering overall. 'Good authorities' as 'samchuyot tovot' reads oddly (authority as power rather than sources). Register is contemporary rather than Victorian-scientific; slightly flattened tone.

Accurate rendering of meaning. 'Authorities' translated literally as pradhikar works but is slightly stiff. Generally fluent Hindi with appropriate formal register, though Victorian rhetorical weight slightly flattened.

Meaning preserved but 'must necessarily be imperfect' rendered awkwardly as 'harus tidak sempurna'. 'Trust reader reposing confidence' slightly reversed in sense. Register flat, not Victorian-scientific.
Fluent and faithful. Minor drift: 'trust to the reader reposing some confidence' rendered as reader's trust in author rather than author asking reader to trust—slight inversion of agency.

Accurate rendering with all key nuances preserved. Slightly repetitive use of 'のみ' and 'ことを望む'; the latter for 'I hope' feels somewhat literal rather than idiomatic. Register appropriately formal for scientific prose.
Accurate and fluent rendering. 'errors will have crept in' slightly softened to 'may exist'. Register is appropriately formal but somewhat modern, lacking Victorian scholarly texture.

'Abstract' left untranslated (should be 'Uittreksel/Samenvatting'). 'waarop ik ben gekomen' is a calque; 'waartoe' expected. Final clause slightly awkward. Meaning preserved; Victorian register somewhat flattened.
English word 'Abstract' left untranslated (should be 'Zarys'/'Streszczenie') -1.5. Otherwise meaning preserved; register acceptable but slightly flattened versus Victorian scientific prose.

Accurate rendering preserving meaning. Natural Portuguese with appropriate formal register. Minor: 'minhas várias afirmações' slightly flat; 'terão se infiltrado' acceptable but 'ter-se-ão infiltrado' more Victorian.

Accurate rendering; 'Резюме' capitalized oddly; 'доверие читателя к моей точности' slightly shifts agency; final relative clause 'но которые...достаточны' is grammatically strained. Victorian tone somewhat flattened.
Accurate and fluent rendering. 'Good authorities' slightly flattened to 'reliable sources'; Victorian register somewhat modernized but meaning preserved.

Accurate rendering of meaning. Slight drift: 'trust to the reader reposing' softened to 'I hope the reader will'. 'arrived at' rendered as 'come to' (vandhirukkum) is slightly colloquial. Victorian formality partly flattened but readable.

Meaning largely preserved but 'authorities' mistranslated as 'official power/authority' (wrong sense). First-person pronoun 'chan' (feminine/casual) inappropriate for Victorian scientific register; should be formal. Awkward phrasing, calque feel.

Accurate rendering overall. 'authorities' as 'nguồn gốc' slightly off (should be authoritative sources). Style somewhat flattened; Victorian scientific register not fully captured. Phrasing occasionally literal/clunky.
Accurate rendering with all key points preserved. Phrasing is clear but modern/academic rather than Victorian in register; 'reposing confidence' flattened. Minor awkwardness in the trust clause.
Accurate rendering; 'good fortune' as 'vast fortune' slightly overstates. Restructuring of second sentence flattens Austen's ironic parallelism somewhat but reads naturally.
Accurate rendering of meaning. Natural Bengali syntax. Opening loses some of Austen's ironic cadence; 'good fortune' rendered simply as wealthy, flattening nuance slightly.
Accurate rendering; 'på udkig efter' slightly flattens the ironic 'must be in want of'. 'område' is plainer than 'neighbourhood'. Overall natural Danish, period tone mostly preserved.
Accurate and fluent. 'Notwendigerweise suchen muss' slightly over-explicit vs. 'must be in want of'; 'sich niederlässt' stronger than 'entering a neighbourhood'. Irony preserved but flattened.

Accurate overall; 'must be in want of a wife' rendered as 'must desire to marry' loses Austen's ironic passive. 'Rightful property' softened to 'just estate'. Fluent Greek but ironic voice slightly flattened.
Accurate and fluent rendering of Austen's opening; 'en busca de' slightly shifts 'must be in want of' toward active seeking, mild style flattening but overall strong.
Faithful, fluent rendering close to standard French translations. 'belle fortune' slightly less ironic than 'good fortune'; 'nouveau voisinage' adds 'nouveau'. Register and irony preserved.

Meaning preserved. 'rightful' rendered as 'natural' (minor drift). 'Neighbourhood' as 'new neighborhood' adds word. Irony partially retained but phrasing slightly flat; 'chafetz be-nisuin' awkward for 'in want of a wife'.

Meaning preserved accurately. Grammar slightly awkward with 'को' after relative clause. 'वैध संपत्ति' renders 'rightful property' adequately. Austen's ironic cadence flattened; opening lacks the epigrammatic punch.
Meaning preserved accurately. 'kekayaan yang baik' is a literal calque; 'secara universal' slightly modern. Irony intact but register flattened, less period-literary feel.

Accurate rendering. Minor agreement error ('poco note possano essere i sentimenti'—should be 'noti'). 'Comunità' slightly flattens 'neighbourhood'. Overall faithful but lacks the polish of canonical versions.

Accurate rendering of meaning. 'Rightful property' as 所有物 is literal but loses ironic sting. Register slightly modern/flat; Austen's dry irony and cadence weakened. 'これほど' slightly awkward for 'so well fixed'.
Meaning preserved but 'however little known' rendered as 'however much known' - slight drift. 'Must be in want of' flattened to obligation. Irony weakened, period literary voice not captured.
Accurate rendering; 'onvermijdelijk' adds slight emphasis. 'een of ander van hun dochters' is awkward (should be 'een of andere'). Irony preserved but slightly flattened register.

Accurate, fluent Polish rendering. Opening loses some of Austen's ironic formality ('Powszechnie wiadomo' flattens the mock-solemn cadence). 'Znaczny majątek' slight drift from 'good fortune'. Otherwise natural.
